name: mse
label: Mean-squared error
summary: The mean squared error between the denoised counts of the training dataset and the true counts of the test dataset after reweighting by the train/test ratio.
description: The mean squared error between the denoised counts of the training dataset and the true counts of the test dataset after reweighting by the train/test ratio.

name: poisson
label: Poisson loss
summary: The Poisson log likelihood of observing the true counts of the test dataset given the distribution given in the denoised dataset.
description: The Poisson log likelihood of observing the true counts of the test dataset given the distribution given in the denoised dataset.
